summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEVA Shelter Management System P0 fixes. All 5 features tested and verified working: 1) Case List thumbnail images display correctly, 2) CaseForm mandatory description dialog for media uploads, 3) Admin Password Change UI in Admin Panel, 4) Sterilisation edit dialog functionality, 5) Prescription upload in Vet Checkups. Backend: 100% pass rate (17/17 tests). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.

issues: Some cases show SEVA logo placeholder instead of paw print icon when no images - minor inconsistency but not a bug

passed_tests: Case List thumbnail images display correctly when case has images
CaseForm shows mandatory description dialog when uploading photos
CaseForm shows mandatory description dialog when uploading videos
Admin Panel has Change Password button visible
Change Password dialog opens with all required fields (current, new, confirm)
Change Password API endpoint exists and validates input
Sterilisation tab shows records with edit buttons
Edit Sterilisation dialog opens with all fields
Add Vet Checkup dialog has Prescription upload field
Vet checkup API returns prescription field
Cases API returns images with storage_path
Vet names and sterilisation locations APIs
critical_code_review_comments: CaseList.jsx: getImageUrl function correctly constructs URL with auth token for Object Storage
CaseForm.jsx: handleImageSelect/handleVideoSelect properly trigger description dialogs before adding files
UserManagement.jsx: ChangePasswordDialog component properly validates password match and minimum length
CaseDetail.jsx: EditSterilisationDialog correctly loads existing data and updates via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified working. Dashboard charts now rendering correctly (previous iteration issue resolved). The app uses Emergent Object Storage for media files - images are accessed via /api/files/{storage_path}?auth={token}. Multiple device login protection is active - each test creates new device ID which may trigger account blocking if testing too frequently.

thumbnail_images_on_case_list.details: CaseList.jsx correctly shows actual images from Object Storage when case has images, shows placeholder (paw print or SEVA logo) when no images

mandatory_description_dialog.details: CaseForm.jsx shows 'Add Description for Photos/Videos' dialog when uploading media, requires description before adding files

admin_password_change.details: UserManagement.jsx has Change Password button in header, ChangePasswordDialog with current/new/confirm password fields, API validates current password

sterilisation_edit_dialog.details: CaseDetail.jsx EditSterilisationDialog opens with all fields (date, gender, location, vet name, notes), Update button saves changes

prescription_upload_in_vet_checkups.details: VetCheckupDialog has 'Prescription (Optional)' file upload field accepting images and PDFs
